YingYi Chen

  • Email: yingyi.chen.inin@gmail.com
  • Linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yingyi-chen/
  • Github.io: https://ininyingyi.github.io/

Work Experience

Phrozen Technology Co., Ltd. 2024 Aug ~ Now

Fullstack Engineer

  • Developed PhrozenGo mobile application using React Native
  • Built backend services with NestJS and admin dashboard with NextJS
  • Deployed company services on AWS EKS with CI/CD via GitHub Actions

Amber Studio 2022 Apr ~ 2023 Mar

Unity Engineer

  • Maintained Rumble Heroes, a mobile game developed by Amber
  • Developed a rhythm game prototype in Amber’s Heroes of Innova, winning 1st place among 10 teams
  • Implemented unit testing using Unity Test Framework

Xinfuyi Marketing Investment Co., Ltd. 2021 Mar ~ 2022 Jan

Developed Cube Mahjong, a casual mobile game launched in Nov 2021

  • Built Unity client with Photon PUN, integrated Firebase and Google/Apple payment systems
  • Developed Mahjong game server using Go + Agones, deployed on GKE with auto-scaling

International Games System Co., Ltd. 2017 Sep ~ 2020 Jul

Senior Software Engineer

  • Developed mobile game Goodluck777, created 10+ mini-games (slots, cards, fish games, etc.)
  • Implemented visual effects with Unity Shader, wrote slot machine server logic in Python
  • Refactored slot machine module, introduced Jenkins CI/CD, promoted to client team leader in 2019

Projects

Unreal Side Project 2023 Mar ~ 2024 Feb

  • Built an online ARPG as a learning project, covering game client, launcher, website, and backend server
  • Built game client and dedicated server with Unreal (C++ & Blueprint), implemented skills using GAS
  • Backend: Golang + Agones + Redis + Spanner with gRPC over SSL, hosted on GKE

Unity Side Project 2020 Aug ~ 2021 Apr

  • Developed a multiplayer party game, learned DOTS architecture, New Input System, and Addressable Asset System

Gamified Crowdsourcing (Master’s Thesis) 2017

  • Developed a mobile AR application using Unity to attract citizens to collect multimedia data in smart cities

Skills

Game Development

  • Unity, Unreal Engine

Web & Mobile Development

  • Frontend: React Native, NextJS
  • Backend: NestJS, Golang, Firebase

Cloud Services

  • AWS: EKS, CloudFront, S3, Lambda, SES
  • GCP: GKE, Compute Engine, Cloud Storage, Spanner

Programming Languages

  • C#, TypeScript, Golang, C/C++, Python

DevOps

  • Git, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Kubernetes

Education

M.S., Computer Science, National Tsing Hua University 2015 Sep ~ 2017 Jun

  • Advisor: Dr. Cheng-Hsin Hsu
  • Research Fields: Mobile Applications, Multimedia Systems
  • GPA: 3.87/4.3

B.S., Computer Science, National Central University 2011 Sep ~ 2015 Jul

Publication

  • [1.] Ying-Yi Chen, Jia-Yu Chen, Ting-Jia Zhang, Ping-Fang Liu, Yu-Hao Chin, and Jia-Ching Wang. Music Genre Classification Using Hierarchical System. In Proceedings of the 6th International Conference on Internet Multimedia Computing and Service (ICIMCS’14). July, 2014.
  • [2.] Ying-Yi Chen, Hua-Jun Hong, Shun-Huai Yao, Aylada Khunvaranont, and Cheng-Hsin Hsu. Gamifying Mobile Applications for Smartphone Augmented Infrastructure Sensing. In Proceedings of the 15th Annual Workshop on Network and Systems Support for Games (NetGames’17). June, 2017.
